alt: Huge adult ocean sunfish swimming with its signature high dorsal fin and disk-like body clearly visible
caption: The ocean sunfish, or Mola mola, is a massive, bizarrely shaped marine fish known for basking at the sea surface.
acquisitionNotes: Manually curated ocean sunfish hero image with verified species identification. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/f/f2/GFNMS_--_Mola_Mola_%2835221024103%29.jpg
